nodes.name: Agentic Analyze
nodes.summary: Scheduled weekly analysis pipeline (Mondays 06:00 UTC). Runs codebase analysis and backlog ranking via scripts/agentic/cli.py analyze and plan commands. Uploads analysis report, plan, and selected-task artifacts. Triggered on schedule, workflow_dispatch, or pushes to agentic config paths.

nodes.name: Agentic Implement
nodes.summary: Implementation pipeline that selects a backlog task, prepares prompts, creates a feature branch, invokes anthropics/claude-code-action to implement changes, validates results, and opens a draft PR. Supports workflow_dispatch and workflow_call triggers. Has three jobs: prepare (analyze/select/export metadata), implement (branch+claude+validate), and dry-run-summary (preview only). Includes concurrency gating to prevent parallel runs.

nodes.name: Agentic Orchestrator
nodes.summary: Orchestration pipeline that chains analysis, planning, and optional implementation. Runs analyze+select, optionally syncs issues to GitHub, decides whether to chain into agentic-implement.yml based on inputs or repository variable AGENTIC_AUTO_IMPLEMENT. Supports manual dispatch with task_id override and dry-run mode. Scheduled runs default to analysis-only unless auto-implement is enabled.

nodes.name: Agentic Plan
nodes.summary: Manual planning pipeline triggered via workflow_dispatch. Runs codebase analysis and task selection. Optionally syncs backlog items as GitHub issues with priority/category labels. Uploads plan artifacts including selected-task.json and plan.md.

nodes.name: Check
nodes.summary: Standard CI quality gate pipeline. Runs on push and pull_request to main. Executes ruff format check, ruff lint, pyright type checking, and pytest with a Python version matrix (3.12, 3.13). Uses astral-sh/setup-uv for fast Python dependency management.

nodes.name: Claude Code Review
nodes.summary: Automated code review pipeline triggered on pull_request_target events (opened, synchronize, ready_for_review, reopened). Runs anthropics/claude-code-action with the code-review plugin to provide AI-powered PR reviews. Uses GITHUB_TOKEN for PR write access.

nodes.name: Claude Code
nodes.summary: On-demand Claude Code Action pipeline triggered by issue comments, PR review comments, issue creation, or PR reviews containing '@claude' mention. Runs anthropics/claude-code-action to respond interactively to natural language requests. Has read-only permissions plus actions:read for CI context.
